## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (typecheck clean)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Self-scan clean: `node dist/cli.js test`
- [ ] New or changed code: added a regression test (a flagged case and a clean look-alike)
- [ ] For a new detection code: updated `src/cases.ts`, the README catalog, and `CHANGELOG.md`
